title: ocotea neesiana
intro: Ocotea neesiana is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae, native to South America, commonly known as Bolivian Sandalwood or Ocotea. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ocotea neesiana are attributed to its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. The plant is often prepared as an essential oil or tincture, which can be used in aromatherapy, skincare, and herbal remedies.
